final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial-style smartphone photo of Korean café coffee and desserts, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays — no people.

Style/medium: needs a Korean café aesthetic shot in a casual smartphone photography style, suitable for Instagram Stories — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a flat-lay or close-up table composition that leaves breathing room ("空白") between annotation elements — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include coffee drink(s) and dessert/sweets as the only subjects; no people
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean café table setting as backdrop
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, bright, airy café atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, fashion-forward light tone direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: must include hand-drawn white-pen annotation layer over the photo: thin one-stroke lines (一筆書き風), slightly rough and uneven, outline-tracing the edges of each object, with arrows and dashed lines as visual guides; moderate decorative elements (steam wisps, sparkles ✨, small hearts ♡, tiny emoticons) — not overdone, preserving negative space
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten Japanese annotations (7割ひらがな・3割かんじ) for each element following these rules:
  • 飲み物 → 味・温度・気持ち（例：さわやか、やさしい甘さ）
  • 食べ物 → 食感・おいしさ（例：しっとり、さいこう）
  • 空間 → 雰囲気（例：まったり、いい時間）
  • 全体 → 一言まとめ（例：しあわせすぎた～）
  Short, diary-like, self-murmuring tone; each annotation placed near its corresponding element with arrow or dashed-line pointer
Constraints: must preserve the "Instagram story × magazine rough-notes" finish; annotations must feel casual and emotional, not typeset; white pen line style must be consistent throughout
Avoid: people, faces, overly polished typography, dense annotation clusters that eliminate all negative space
